Video.summary: A woman tosses her printer, a DIY haircut goes wrong, and a man walks into shrink wrap.
Video.title: Episode 1622

Video.summary: Three $100,000 winners compete for the ultimate prize: Disney Vacation Club membership.
Video.title: Episode 1623

Video.summary: A baby slip, priest bonk, falling branch on a bride, and a cop’s open-fly moment.
Video.title: Episode 421

Video.summary: A boy sticks a booger on his brother's head; a dog - runs through a screen door; and a laughing llama.
Video.title: Episode 422

Video.summary: A fake dog causes a real scare; a seagull steals a hat; and a boy - uses butter to slip out of an inner tube.
Video.title: Episode 423

Video.summary: A boy gets a bad haircut; a frog jumps on a baby's - face; and trash cans - float away in a flood.
Video.title: Episode 424

Video.summary: A man takes a horseshoe to the head; plus previous winners return to - compete for the $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: Episode 425
